candidate_problem_record.subject: physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: 1093 A block of mass $m$ slides without friction on an inclined plane of mass $M$ which in turn is free to slide without friction on a horizontal table (Fig. 1.65). Write sufficient equations to find the motion of the block and the inclined plane. You do not need to solve these equations. (Wisconsin)
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。
